page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Deepvariant is an analysis pipeline that uses a deep neural network to call genetic variants from next-generation dna sequencing data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepVariant is a deep learning-based variant caller that takes aligned reads (in BAM or CRAM format), produces pileup image tensors from them, classifies each tensor using a convolutional neural network, and finally reports the results in a standard VCF or gVCF file.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepVariant is a deep learning-based variant caller that takes aligned reads (in BAM or CRAM format), produces pileup image tensors from them, classifies each tensor using a convolutional neural network, and finally reports the results in a standard VCF or gVCF file.
